rules.name: myRule_1
rules.label: Chargent Transaction Approval Date NOT BLANK

rules.name: myRule_3
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: Payment is other than Credit Card

Flow.description: Process that updates Transaction records when payments, refunds are Approved TransApprovalDate not null v2 10/4/2021
Flow.label: Chargent Orders - On Create or Edit
